projects.overrideDescription: AES-256 encrypted vault with biometric authentication, SQLCipher, Android Keystore, and Clean Architecture + MVVM.
features: Biometric + PIN authentication with auto lock-down mechanism
SQLCipher encrypted database for file metadata
Android Keystore for hardware-isolated key storage and generation
In-app file viewer, decrypted on demand

projects.name: Roadside assistance platform
projects.overrideDescription: Collaborative university project for roadside assistance, featuring real-time communication and location tracking.
features: Real-time assistance requests with GPS tracking
Live chat communication between users and service providers using RabbitMQ
Mapbox integration for displaying provider locations and navigation
MVVM architecture for maintainable code structure
Clean Architecture for scalable and testable code
MLKit for on-device machine learning capabilities

projects.name: Assurini
projects.overrideDescription: Hackathon car insurance app with Apollo GraphQL and MLKit integration.
features: File claims with image recognition for damage assessment
Real-time notifications and updates on claim status

projects.overrideDescription: Media3-based music player with Material 3 design, Room persistence, Koin dependency injection and DeezerAPI integration for artist information.
